expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers highlight activation, persistence, deselection, and interaction safety for bar chart and heatmap
expectations.evidence: The output identifies the required advisory focus (activation/persistence/deselection/interaction safety for Bar Chart and Heatmap) but explicitly states it cannot verify checkpoint enforcement due to missing phase5b artifacts: result.md: "Not Demonstrated / Blocked by Missing Phase 5b Artifacts." and execution_notes.md: "shipment-checkpoint enforcement ... cannot be verified." Therefore the case focus is not demonstrated as covered by an actual shipment checkpoint.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The outputs are explicitly framed as Phase 5b shipment checkpoint review and reference phase5b rubric/contracts: result.md title "Phase 5b Checkpoint Enforcement" and "Primary phase validated: phase5b (shipment checkpoint rubric referenced)." execution_notes.md also states phase5b is shipment-checkpoint review and lists phase5b references.
